excluded_policy.truth_boundary: MANIFEST_CURRENT.json, runtime markers and SHA256SUMS are excluded to avoid self-referential hashes; pytest temp and export outputs are not package truth.

route_status_marker_hotfix.truth_boundary: This records a routing/status hotfix. It does not claim a persistent background process.

truth_boundary: Manifest describes the active unpacked folder snapshot. Mutable runtime files are listed with deferred hashes because they change during runtime. ZIP files remain import/export sources, not active state.
